x60 = 64
x30 = 32
x30 = 32
x24 = 32
x24 = 32
x10 = 16
x2 = 4
x2 = 4
x2 = 4
x2 = 4
x2 = 4

60 < 64 = /26
192.168.0.0 	nw
192.168.0.63	bc

30 < 32 = /27
